# SatelliteDish

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SatelliteDish;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SatelliteDish { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
antenna, receiver, dish aerial, saucer

## Categories
connectivity, devices, multimedia

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/satellite-dish)
